name: Secret Placeholder
description: Hard-masking secret management: AI never sees real values. Secrets are auto-redacted in all messages before reaching the model, restored at tool execution time, and optionally revealed in user-facing output.

file.description: Path to the secrets JSON file (resolved via resolvePath)

enableContextRedaction.description: Redact all secret values in messages before they reach the AI model (before_prompt_build).

enableOutputSubstitution.description: Substitute {{NAME}} placeholders back to real values in outbound messages to the user (message_sending).
